race.comment: BRAND HER BOLD (9) is a progressive filly who scored her maiden here last time, winding up strongly to score. Poor gate but there will be plenty of pressure up front and will be storming home. REGAL SECRET (2) led throughout to score two back then went forward from a wide draw last time and was swamped late. Has a poor gate again but best form stacks up and looks a big chance to atone. SICILIAN PRINCESS (10) was a maiden winner two back then tackled stakes class latest and wasn't far away. Back in grade and well worth another chance despite the wide gate. INVERTATIONAL (6) turned in a big run from the back off a wide gate last time and will be tough to stop. EMPIRE GRACE (11) is fitter for two trials and can run a bold race fresh.
